title: 2 Multi-Trillion-Dollar Investing Megatrends You Won't Want to Miss
text: Blackstone sees $1 trillion of investment opportunities in digital infrastructure over the next five years. Energy transition will require $4.5 trillion of investment annually for the next couple of decades.

text: Fintel reports that on July 21, 2023, JP Morgan downgraded their outlook for Blackstone (NYSE:BX) from Overweight to Neutral.

title: U.S. bank lending falls slightly in latest week
text: The numbers: Commercial and industrial lending — a key driver of economic activity — fell by $2.1 billion to $2.75 trillion in the week ending July 12, the Federal Reserve said Friday.

title: Buy gold and sell U.S. dollars, this strategist says. Here's why.
text: As investors increase their bets on a soft landing scenario, gold's price could rise at the expense of the U.S. dollar.

title: Blackstone's Q2 2023: Breaking Through The Trillion Dollar Ceiling
text: Blackstone's Q2 2023 earnings report shows a 12% year-on-year surge in fee-related earnings and assets under management, reaching $1 trillion, solidifying its position in the alternative investment industry. The firm's success is attributed to strategic diversification, expansion, data-driven decision-making, talent retention, and risk management, with key growth areas identified for the future. Despite minor fluctuations in revenues and margins, Blackstone's consistent performance and adaptability make it a compelling case for investors, with significant growth opportunities identified in the future.

title: Blackstone (BX) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Expenses Rise Y/Y
text: Blackstone (BX) records a decline in segmental revenues in the second quarter of 2023.

title: Blackstone stock price forms a golden cross: rating upgrade, 10% upside
text: Blackstone (NYSE: BX) stock price recovery gained steam after the company published strong financial results. The shares surged to a high of $108 on Thursday, the highest level since November last year.

title: Investors Are Already Asking How Quickly Blackstone Can Get the Next Trillion

title: Blackstone Inc. (BX) Reports Q2 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: The headline numbers for Blackstone Inc. (BX) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended June 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Blackstone Inc. (BX) Surpasses Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Blackstone Inc. (BX) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.93 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.92 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.49 per share a year ago.

title: Blackstone assets top $1 trillion, but stock pulls back as segment revenue misses expectations
text: Shares of Blackstone Inc. BX, -0.67% took a 2.3% hit in morning trading Thursday, to snap a five-day win streak and pull back from an eight-month high, after the asset manager boasted being the first to surpass $1 trillion in assets under management, but reported segment revenue the fell more than expected. Net distributable income fell to $1.21 billion, or 93 cents a share, from $1.99 billion, or $1.49 a share, in the year-ago period, to top the FactSet consensus for earnings per share of 92 cents.

title: Blackstone shares fall on earnings plunge despite hitting $1T milestone
text: Blackstone Group shares fell before the opening bell in New York Thursday as the asset management firm said its second-quarter distributable earnings fell 39% over the year-ago quarter. For the period, the company posted distributable earnings, being the profit available to shareholders, of $1.2 billion ($0.93 per share), down from almost $2 billion this time in 2022.

title: Philadelphia Fed's manufacturing gauge remains in negative territory in July for 11th straight month
text: The numbers: The Philadelphia Fed said Thursday its gauge of regional business activity inched up to negative 13.5 in July from negative 13.7 in the prior month. Any reading below zero indicates deteriorating conditions.

title: Blackstone Reaches $1 Trillion in Assets
text: The private-equity firm is the first among its publicly traded peers to hit that mark.

title: The liquidity drain isn't crashing U.S. markets as feared. Here's a big reason why.
text: The U.S. stock market hasn't found a reason to call it quits yet on the 2023 rally, despite a flood of Treasury debt issuance at plump yields which is helping to drain liquidity from financial markets.

title: What happened in Beijing? Here are two theories on what it means for markets
text: There was, one could say, a highly speculative story from the New York Post that Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen may have consumed hallucinogenic mushrooms during her trip to China. CNN offered a bit more detail, pointing out the mushrooms are not hallucinogenic when cooked, which the restaurant where she dined insists they were.

title: U.S. industrial output weak across the board in June
text: The numbers: Industrial production fell 0.5% in June, with declines in most market groups, the Federal Reserve reported Tuesday.

title: Inflows, AUM Growth Likely to Aid Blackstone's (BX) Q2 Earnings
text: Driven by inflows, Blackstone's (BX) AUM balance is likely to have increased in the second quarter of 2023.

title: New York Fed's Empire State factory gauge dips but stays positive in July
text: The numbers: The New York Fed's Empire State business conditions index, a gauge of manufacturing activity in the state, fell 5.5 points in July to 1.1, the regional Fed bank said Monday.

title: Gold pulls back after best week since April as weak China data weigh on commodities
text: Gold prices are pulling back on Monday following their biggest weekly advance since April as weaker-than-expected GDP data out of China weighed on commodities prices.

title: 5 Stocks You Can Confidently Invest $500 in Right Now
text: Digitalization, decarbonization, deglobalization, and the continued rise of alternative investments are major long-term investing megatrends. American Tower, Blackstone, Brookfield Infrastructure, Prologis, and NextEra Energy are focused on different megatrends.

title: U.S. bank lending holds steady in latest week
text: The numbers: Commercial and industrial loans — a key economic driver — held roughly steady in the week ending July 5, the Federal Reserve said Friday. Loans rose $200 million to $2.754 trillion, the central bank said.

title: Blackstone: Getting Expensive, But Still A Buy
text: Blackstone has many good characteristics, it's asset light and has a track-record of growth and great brand recognition. Unfortunately, its heavily performance-oriented fee structure makes earnings very cyclical and valuation tricky. I cut through the noise and present my analysis of this giant.

title: Blackstone Is Still A Hold In The Current Market
text: I analyze Blackstone, a leading alternative asset manager, for its investment potential, with the company's fundamentals, valuation, growth opportunities, and risks considered. The company enjoys several growth opportunities as alternative assets are becoming very attractive to investors. Despite the growth opportunities, there are risks to the investment thesis, and the current valuation is not compelling.

title: Blackstone Stock: June Inflation Report Implications
text: Blackstone has an impressive track record but has hit a speed bump recently due to soaring inflation and interest rates. The stock has recovered sharply in recent days due in part to better-than-expected inflation data. We look at the implications for BX's business and re-assess if the stock is still a Buy here.

title: JPMorgan, Citi and Wells earnings to unleash borrowing blitz by banks
text: Big U.S. banks kick off second-quarter earnings on Friday, with investors bracing for a subsequent wave of borrowing in the bond market from America's top lenders.

title: U.S. budget deficit widens to $227.8 billion in June
text: The numbers: The U.S. federal budget deficit widened sharply to $227.7 billion in June, up from $88.8 billion in the same month last year, the Treasury Department said Thursday.

title: Blackstone Inc. (BX) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: What to Know Ahead of Q2 Release

title: First signs of wobbling emerge as ECB official notes weaker data
text: The first sign that the European Central Bank might not go through with a rate hike in July occurred as an official noted weaker data.

title: Fed's Beige Book points to continued slow growth
text: The Federal Reserve's business contacts across the nation said that economic activity increased only slightly in late May and June and the slow growth was expected to continue, according to the central bank's latest Beige Book report released Wednesday.

title: ‘Like a dark cloud disappearing': Treasury yield curve goes less negative after June CPI
text: Wednesday's U.S. June inflation data produced welcome relief for investors, taking pressure off a deeply inverted Treasury yield curve for now.The 2-year rate TMUBMUSD02Y, 4.737% was trading around 85 basis points above the 10-year yield TMUBMUSD10Y, 3.855% in New York Wednesday morning — producing the least negative spread between the two yields in about a month. The 2s10s spread had been at more than minus 100 basis points as recently as last week, and was minus 92.96 basis points early Wednesday before the June consumer price index came out.Wednesday's CPI data contained the lowest annual headline inflation rate since 2021, at 3% — giving investors and traders a taste of the long-awaited decline in inflation they had been hoping for.

title: Blackstone Inc. (BX) Soars 5.5%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
text: Blackstone Inc. (BX) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

title: CIOXY vs. BX: Which Stock Should Value Investors Buy Now?
text: Investors interested in stocks from the Financial - Miscellaneous Services sector have probably already heard of Cielo SA (CIOXY) and Blackstone Inc. (BX). But which of these two stocks offers value investors a better bang for their buck right now?

title: Fed's Williams says economy won't hit its weakest point until next year
text: The U.S. economy won't hit its weakest point of this cycle until 2024, according to New York Federal Reserve President John Williams.

title: Consumers slam on brakes on borrowing in May
text: The numbers: Total consumer credit rose $7.2 billion in May, down from a revised $20.3 billion gain in the prior month, the Federal Reserve said Monday. That translates into a 1.8% annual rate, down from a revised 5% gain in the prior month.

title: Fed's reverse repo facility sees demand tumble to $1.8 trillion as Treasury bill deluge refills U.S. coffers
text: Demand for the Federal Reserve's popular overnight reverse repo facility has dropped to about $1.8 trillion daily from its near $2.6 trillion peak in December in the wake of the June U.S. debt-ceiling deal.

title: Fed's Mester calls for slightly higher interest rates
text: The Federal Reserve needs to raise interest rates further because inflation is now expected to be above the Fed's target for four years, Cleveland Fed President Loretta Mester said Monday.

title: Either economy is about to break, or more tightening will be needed, strategist says
text: That's the assessment of strategists at BNP Paribas led by William Marshall, head of U.S. rates strategy, who are looking not just at Federal Reserve balances but also what's happening at the European Central Bank and Bank of Japan.

title: Blackstone Inc. (BX) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
text: Zacks.com users have recently been watching Blackstone Inc. (BX) quite a bit. Thus, it is worth knowing the facts that could determine the stock's prospects.
